5337:         _output_latex($output_file, "The following test is described as: $description\n");
5338:     }
5339:     else
5340:     {
5341:         if ($ct_1)
5342:         {
5343:             my $subdescription = $command_tests->[0]->{description};
5344: 
5345:             $description .= ": $subdescription";
5346:         }
5347: 
5348:         _output_latex($output_file, '\subsection{' . ucfirst $description . "}\n\n");
5349:     }
5350: }
5351: 
5352: 
5353: sub _output_latex_command_definition_harnessing
5354: {
5355:     my $command_definition = shift;
5356: 
5357:     my $ss = shift;
5358: 
5359:     my $cd_1 = $ss->{cd_1};
5360: 
5361:     my $harnessing = $command_definition->{harnessing};
5362: 
5363:     if ($harnessing->{preparation})
5364:     {
5365:         if ($cd_1)
5366:         {
5367:             print $output_file '\item [$\bullet$]';
5368:         }
5369: 
5370:         _output_latex($output_file, '\begin{' . "itemize" . "}\n");
5371: 
5372:         _output_latex($output_file, '\item ');
5373: 
5374:         _output_latex_prompt($output_file, "textit", $command_definition->{harnessing}->{preparation}, "Preparation: ", "\n");
5375: 
5376:         _output_latex($output_file, '\item ');
5377: 
5378:         _output_latex_prompt($output_file, "textit", $command_definition->{harnessing}->{reparation}, "Reparation: ", "\n");
5379: 
5380:         _output_latex($output_file, '\end{' . "itemize" . "}\n");
5381:     }
5382: }
5383: 
5384: 
5385: sub _output_latex_command_test_comments
5386: {
5387:     my $command_test = shift;
5388: 
5389:     my $ss = shift;
5390: 
5391:     my $cd_1 = $ss->{cd_1};
5392: 
5393:     if ($command_test->{comments})
5394:     {
5395:         if ($cd_1)
5396:         {
5397:             print $output_file '\item [$\bullet$]';
5398:         }
5399: 
5400:         _output_latex_environment_minipage
5401:             (
5402:              $output_file,
5403:              {
5404:               content => $command_test->{comment},
5405:               content_type => "minipage",
5406:               content_type_options => '{14cm}',
5407:               content_type_embedding => "small",
5408:               prompt => "NOTE\\::",
5409:               prompt_type => 'textbf',
5410:               suffix => "\n\n",
5411:              },
5412:             );
5413:     }
5414: }
5415: 
5416: 
5417: sub _output_latex_command_test_description
5418: {
5419:     my $command_test = shift;
5420: 
5421:     my $ss = shift;
5422: 
5423:     my $ct_1 = $ss->{ct_1};
5424: 
5425:     my $description = $command_test->{description};
5426: 
5427:     if ($ct_1)
5428:     {
5429:         # _output_latex($output_file, "This test is described as: $description\n\n");
5430:     }
5431:     else
5432:     {
5433:         _output_latex($output_file, '\subsubsection{' . ucfirst $description . "}\n\n");
5434:     }
5435: }
5436: 
5437: 
5438: sub _output_latex_command_test_disabled
5439: {
5440:     my $command_test = shift;
5441: 
5442:     my $ss = shift;
5443: 
5444:     my $cd_1 = $ss->{cd_1};
5445: 
5446:     #! this seems to be wrong, cannot have the disabled
5447:     #! clause of each command test in a isolated bullet,
5448:     #! maybe this also needs a $ct_1?
5449: 
5450:     if ($cd_1
5451:         and $command_test->{disabled})
5452:     {
5453:         print $output_file '\item [$\bullet$]';
5454: 
5455:         _output_latex_prompt($output_file, "textbf", $command_test->{disabled}, "note that this test was disabled: \n", "\n\n");
5456:     }
5457: }
5458: 
5459: 
5460: sub _output_latex_command_test_read
5461: {
5462:     my $command_test = shift;
5463: 
5464:     my $ss = shift;
5465: 
5466:     my $cd_1 = $ss->{cd_1};
5467: 
5468:     my $read = $command_test->{read} || "";
5469: 
5470:     if ($read)
5471:     {
5472:         if ($cd_1)
5473:         {
5474:             print $output_file '\item [$\bullet$]';
5475:         }
5476: 
5477:         _output_latex_environment_prompt
5478:             (
5479:              $output_file,
5480:              {
5481:               content => $read,
5482:               content_line_limit => 10,
5483:               content_type => "Verbatim",
5484:               content_type_options => '[fontsize=\relsize{-2}]',
5485:               prompt => "Expected application output:\n",
5486:               suffix => "\n\n",
5487:              },
5488:             );
5489:     }
5490: }
5491: 
5492: 
5493: sub _output_latex_command_test_write
5494: {
5495:     my $command_test = shift;
5496: 
5497:     my $ss = shift;
5498: 
5499:     my $cd_1 = $ss->{cd_1};
5500: 
5501:     my $write = $command_test->{write} || "";
5502: 
5503:     if ($write)
5504:     {
5505:         if ($cd_1)
5506:         {
5507:             print $output_file '\item [$\bullet$]';
5508:         }
5509: 
5510:         _output_latex_environment_prompt
5511:             (
5512:              $output_file,
5513:              {
5514:               content => $write,
5515:               content_line_limit => 10,
5516:               content_type => "Verbatim",
5517:               content_type_options => '[fontsize=\relsize{-2}]',
5518:               prompt => "The input to the application is:\n",
5519:               suffix => "\n\n",
5520:              },
5521:             );
5522:     }
5523: }
5524: 
5525: 
5526: sub _output_latex_process
5527: {
5528:     my $output_filename = shift;
5529: 
5530:     my $test_report = shift;
5531: 
5532:     my $module_definitions = $test_report->{selected};
5533: 
5534:     my $ss = Heterarch::Test::Output::StructureSummary->new();
5535: 
5536:     foreach my $module_definition_key (sort
5537:                                        {
5538:                                            my $selected_a = $a;
5539:                                            my $selected_b = $b;
5540: 
5541:                                            my $counter_a = $module_definitions->{$selected_a}->{count};
5542:                                            my $counter_b = $module_definitions->{$selected_b}->{count};
5543: 
5544:                                            $counter_a <=> $counter_b;
5545:                                        }
5546:                                        keys %$module_definitions)
5547:     {
5548:         my $module_definition = $module_definitions->{$module_definition_key};
5549: 
5550:         my $module_definition_description = $module_definition->{description};
5551: 
5552:         my $module_definition_documentation = $module_definition->{documentation} || "";
5553: 
5554:         my $command_definitions = $module_definition->{command_definitions};
5555: 
5556:         # output the description as a section title
5557: 
5558:         _output_latex($output_file, '\section{' . ucfirst $module_definition_description . "}\n\n");
5559: 
5560:         # create indexes into the styling table
5561: 
5562:         $ss->ss_command_definitions($command_definitions);
5563: 
5564:         # output the filename
5565: 
5566:         _output_latex_module_filename_insert($module_definition, $module_definition_documentation, $ss);
5567: 
5568:         # output the documentation and explanation
5569: 
5570:         _output_latex_module_documentation($module_definition_documentation);
5571: 
5572:         # output the preparation and reparation
5573: 
5574:         _output_latex_module_harnessing($module_definition, $ss);
5575: 
5576:         # output comments / notes
5577: 
5578:         _output_latex_module_comments($module_definition);
5579: 
5580:         # output the command definitions
5581: 
5582:         foreach my $command_definition (@$command_definitions)
5583:         {
5584:             # create indexes into the styling table
5585: 
5586:             my $command_tests = $command_definition->{command_tests};
5587: 
5588:             $ss->ss_command_tests($command_tests);
5589: 
5590:             if ($ss->{cd_1})
5591:             {
5592:                 print $output_file '\begin{enumerate}[noitemsep,nolistsep]' . "\n";
5593:             }
5594: 
5595:             # output the command_definition description
5596: 
5597:             _output_latex_command_definition_description($command_definition, $ss);
5598: 
5599:             # output the command and its arguments
5600: 
5601:             _output_latex_command_definition_command_arguments($command_definition, $ss);
5602: 
5603:             # output the command comments
5604: 
5605:             _output_latex_command_definition_comments($command_definition, $ss);
5606: 
5607:             # output the preparation and reparation
5608: 
5609:             _output_latex_command_definition_harnessing($command_definition, $ss);
5610: 
5611:             # loop over all the command tests
5612: 
5613:             foreach my $command_test (@$command_tests)
5614:             {
5615:                 # output the disabled clause
5616: 
5617:                 _output_latex_command_test_disabled($command_test, $ss);
5618: 
5619:                 # output the description clause
5620: 
5621:                 _output_latex_command_test_description($command_test, $ss);
5622: 
5623:                 # output the write clause
5624: 
5625:                 _output_latex_command_test_write($command_test, $ss);
5626: 
5627:                 # output the read clause
5628: 
5629:                 _output_latex_command_test_read($command_test, $ss);
5630: 
5631:                 # if figures should be generated
5632: 
5633:                 if ($option_output_figures)
5634:                 {
5635:                     # loop over all the figures for this command test
5636: 
5637:                     my $figures = $command_test->{figures};
5638: 
5639:                     my $figure_references = [];
5640: 
5641:                     my $read = $command_test->{read} || "";
5642: 
5643:                     foreach my $figure (@$figures)
5644:                     {
5645:                         _output_latex_figure_generate_insert($figure, $output_filename,  $command_test, $figure_references, $read);
5646:                     }
5647: 
5648:                     if (scalar @$figure_references)
5649:                     {
5650:                         $ss->ss_figure_references($figure_references);
5651: 
5652:                         _output_latex_figure_references_insert($figure_references, $ss);
5653:                     }
5654:                 }
5655: 
5656:                 # output the comments clause
5657: 
5658:                 _output_latex_command_test_comments($command_test, $ss);
5659:             }
5660: 
5661:             if ($ss->{cd_1})
5662:             {
5663:                 print $output_file '\end{enumerate}' . "\n";
5664:             }
5665:         }
5666:     }
5667: }
5668: 
5669: 
5670: sub _output_latex_prompt
5671: {
5672:     my $outputfile = shift;
5673: 
5674:     my $content_type = shift;
5675: 
5676:     my $content = shift;
5677: 
5678:     my $prompt = shift;
5679: 
5680:     my $suffix = shift;
5681: 
5682:     if (defined $content)
5683:     {
5684:         _output_latex($output_file, $prompt);
5685: 
5686:         if ($content_type)
5687:         {
5688:             print $output_file '\\' . $content_type . '{';
5689:         }
5690: 
5691:         _output_latex($output_file, " $content ");
5692: 
5693:         if ($content_type)
5694:         {
5695:             print $output_file "}";
5696:         }
5697:     }
5698: 
5699:     _output_latex($output_file, $suffix);
5700: }
5701: 
5702: 
5703: sub process
5704: {
5705:     my $self = shift;
5706: 
5707:     my $output_filename = shift;
5708: 
5709:     my $test_module_library_contents = shift;
5710: 
5711:     my $global_test_report = shift;
5712: 
5713:     _output_latex_preamble
5714:         (
5715:          $output_filename,
5716:          $test_module_library_contents->{html_introduction},
5717:         );
5718: 
5719:     _output_latex_process($output_filename, $global_test_report);
5720: 
5721:     _output_latex_postamble();
5722: }
5723: 
5724: 
5725: package Heterarch::Test::Output::Formatter::Figure;
5726: 
5727: 
5728: sub generate_label
5729: {
5730:     my $self = shift;
5731: 
5732:     my $type = shift;
5733: 
5734:     # create the label for this figure
5735: 
5736:     my $figure_definition = $self->{figure_definition};
5737: 
5738:     my $context_path = $self->{context_path};
5739: 
5740:     #! this may be latex specific
5741: 
5742:     if ($type eq 'latex')
5743:     {
5744:         my $figure_label = "fig:$context_path-$figure_definition->{name}";
5745: 
5746:         # add it to the list of references
5747: 
5748:         my $figure_references = $self->{figure_references};
5749: 
5750:         push @$figure_references, $figure_label;
5751: 
5752:         # set figure label
5753: 
5754:         $self->{figure_label} = $figure_label;
5755: 
5756:         # return: no error
5757: 
5758:         return undef;
5759:     }
5760:     else
5761:     {
5762:         return  \ "$0: only latex labels have been implemented.";
5763:     }
5764: }
5765: 
5766: 
5767: sub insert
5768: {
5769:     my $self = shift;
5770: 
5771:     my $figure_definition = shift;
5772: 
5773:     my $full_caption = $figure_definition->{caption}->{full};
5774: 
5775:     my $short_caption = $figure_definition->{caption}->{short};
5776: 
5777:     my $filenames = $self->{filenames};
5778: 
5779:     # insert the figure filename in the latex file
5780: 
5781:     $self->insert_figure_environment
5782:         (
5783:          $output_file,
5784:          {
5785:           caption => [ $full_caption, ],
5786:           caption_short => [ $short_caption, ],
5787:           content_type_options => '[ht]',
5788:           includegraphics => $filenames,
5789:           label => $self->{figure_label},
5790:          },
5791:         );
5792: 
5793:     # return result: no error
5794: 
5795:     return undef;
5796: }
5797: 
5798: 
5799: sub insert_figure_environment
5800: {
5801:     my $self = shift;
5802: 
5803:     my $outputfile = shift;
5804: 
5805:     my $content_options = shift;
5806: 
5807:     my $content_type_options = $content_options->{content_type_options} || "";
5808:     my $includegraphics = $content_options->{includegraphics};
5809:     my $caption = $content_options->{caption};
5810:     my $caption_short = $content_options->{caption_short} || "";
5811:     my $label = $content_options->{label};
5812: 
5813: # \begin{figure}
5814: # \fbox{\includegraphics[width=\linewidth]{/tmp/abcdef-output_graph_render.pdf}}
5815: # \end{figure}
5816: 
5817: # % \begin{figure}[ht]
5818: # %   \includegraphics*[scale=0.1]{/tmp/abcdef-output_graph_render.pdf}
5819: # % %  \resizebox{2cm}{!} {\includegraphics{/tmp/abcdef-output_graph_render.pdf}}
5820: # %   \caption[Ten passive compartments voltage clamped]{\small Ten passive compartments clamped with command voltage of 0.1V using a perfect clamp object.}
5821: # %   \label{fig:perfectclamp}
5822: # % \end{figure}
5823: 
5824:     # if there is content
5825: 
5826:     if (defined $includegraphics)
5827:     {
5828:         # output the content begin marker
5829: 
5830:         print $output_file '\begin{figure}' . "$content_type_options\n";
5831: 
5832: #       print $output_file '  \center'. "\n";
5833: 
5834:         my $width_divider = 1 / scalar @$includegraphics;
5835: 
5836:         my $includegraphics_options = "[width=$width_divider" . '\linewidth]';
5837: 
5838:         foreach my $includegraphic (@$includegraphics)
5839:         {
5840:             print $output_file '  \includegraphics' . $includegraphics_options . "{$includegraphic}\n";
5841:         }
5842: 
5843:         for (my $index = 0 ; $index < scalar @$caption ; $index++)
5844:         {
5845: #           print $output_file '  \begin{minipage}' . '{' . $width_divider . '\linewidth}' . "\n";
5846: 
5847:             print $output_file '    \caption[' . $caption_short->[$index] . ']{\small \textbf{' . $caption->[$index] . '}}' . "\n";
5848: 
5849: #           print $output_file '  \end{minipage}' . "\n";
5850:         }
5851: 
5852:         if ($label)
5853:         {
5854:             print $output_file '  \label{'. $label . '}' . "\n";
5855:         }
5856: 
5857: # \begin{figure}[ht]
5858: #   \center
5859: #   \includegraphics[scale=0.6]{figures/mstep.eps}
5860: #   \caption[Staggered Time Grid]{\small \index{staggered
5861: #       time grid} Mid step evaluation of membrane potential and
5862: #     Hodgkin-Huxley equations.  To calculate the conductance at time
5863: #     point 2, we need the membrane potential at time point 1.  To
5864: #     calculate the membrane potential at time point 3, we need the
5865: #     conductance at time point 2.  The membrane potential at time point
5866: #     2 is never computed, neither the conductance at time point 3.}
5867: #   \label{fig:midstep}
5868: # \end{figure}
5869: 
5870:         # output the content end marker
5871: 
5872:         print $output_file '\end{figure}' . "\n\n";
5873:     }
5874: 
5875:     # return result: no error
5876: 
5877:     return undef;
5878: }
5879: 
5880: 
5881: sub new
5882: {
5883:     my $package = shift;
5884: 
5885:     my $figure_definition = shift;
5886: 
5887:     my $filename_prefix = shift;
5888: 
5889:     my $command_test = shift;
5890: 
5891:     my $figure_references = shift;
5892: 
5893:     my $data_string = shift;
5894: 
5895:     my $context_path = $command_test->{context_path};
5896: 
5897:     $context_path =~ s(/)(___)g;
5898:     $context_path =~ s(\.)(__)g;
5899: 
5900:     my $pathname_prefix = "$filename_prefix$context_path-$figure_definition->{name}";
5901: 
5902:     my $self
5903:         = {
5904:            context_path => $context_path,
5905:            data_string => $data_string,
5906:            figure_definition => $figure_definition,
5907:            figure_references => $figure_references,
5908:            filename_prefix => $filename_prefix,
5909:            pathname_prefix => $pathname_prefix,
5910:           };
5911: 
5912:     bless $self, $package;
5913: 
5914:     return $self;
5915: }
5916: 
5917: 
5918: sub render_raw_data
5919: {
5920:     my $self = shift;
5921: 
5922:     my $output_filename = shift;
5923: 
5924:     my $data_string = shift;
5925: 
5926:     # create the data file
5927: 
5928:     my $figure_definition = $self->{figure_definition};
5929: 
5930:     my $pathname_prefix = $self->{pathname_prefix};
5931: 
5932:     my $data_filename = $pathname_prefix . "_output_graph_render_data";
5933: 
5934:     my $fh_data = IO::File->new("> $data_filename");
5935: 
5936:     if (not defined $fh_data)
5937:     {
5938:         return \ "$0: render_raw_data(): error opening result data file";
5939:     }
5940: 
5941:     # write the data
5942: 
5943:     print $fh_data $data_string;;
5944: 
5945:     $fh_data->close();
5946: 
5947:     # create the figure_definition file
5948: 
5949:     my $figure_definition_filename = $pathname_prefix . "_output_graph_render_figure_definition.yml";
5950: 
5951:     YAML::DumpFile($figure_definition_filename, $figure_definition);
5952: 
5953:     # create the figure graph
5954: 
5955:     my $command = "data_2_figure --figure-filename '$figure_definition_filename' --input-data '$data_filename' --output-filename '$output_filename'";
5956: 
5957:     if ($option_verbose)
5958:     {
5959:         print $global_fd_output "$0: Executing '$command'\n";
5960:     }
5961: 
5962:     system $command;
5963: 
5964:     if ($?)
5965:     {
5966:         return \ "$0: render_raw_data: '$command' failed";
5967:     }
5968:     else
5969:     {
5970:         return undef;
5971:     }
5972: }
5973: 
5974: 
5975: sub render_array
5976: {
5977:     my $self = shift;
5978: 
5979:     my $output_filename = shift;
5980: 
5981:     my $array = shift;
5982: 
5983:     my $start = shift;
5984: 
5985:     my $end = shift;
5986: 
5987:     my $step = shift;
5988: 
5989:     # convert the array to raw_data
5990: 
5991:     my $raw_data = "";
5992: 
5993:     foreach my $entry (@$array)
5994:     {
5995:         $raw_data .= "$start $entry\n";
5996: 
5997:         $start += $step;
5998:     }
5999: 
6000:     # render the raw data, result is the figure filename
6001: 
6002:     my $error = $self->render_raw_data($output_filename, $raw_data);
6003: 
6004:     if ($error)
6005:     {
6006:         return $error;
6007:     }
6008:     else
6009:     {
6010:         return $output_filename;
6011:     }
6012: }
6013: 
6014: 
6015: package Heterarch::Test::Output::Formatter::Figure::HHGatesAB;
6016: 
6017: 
6018: our @ISA = ("Heterarch::Test::Output::Formatter::Figure");
6019: 
6020: 
6021: package Heterarch::Test::Output::Formatter::Figure::HHGatesAlphaBeta;
6022: 
6023: 
6024: our @ISA = ("Heterarch::Test::Output::Formatter::Figure");
6025: 
6026: 
6027: sub insert
6028: {
6029:     my $self = shift;
6030: 
6031:     my $figure_definition = shift;
6032: 
6033:     my $full_caption = $figure_definition->{caption}->{full};
6034: 
6035:     my $short_caption = $figure_definition->{caption}->{short};
6036: 
6037:     my $filenames = $self->{filenames};
6038: 
6039:     # insert the figure filename in the latex file
6040: 
6041:     $self->insert_figure_environment
6042:         (
6043:          $output_file,
6044:          {
6045:           caption_main => $full_caption,
6046:           caption_main_short => $short_caption,
6047:           content_type_options => '[ht]',
6048:           includegraphics => $filenames,
6049:           label => $self->{figure_label},
6050:          },
6051:         );
6052: }
6053: 
6054: 
6055: sub insert_figure_environment
6056: {
6057:     my $self = shift;
6058: 
6059:     my $outputfile = shift;
6060: 
6061:     my $content_options = shift;
6062: 
6063:     my $content_type_options = $content_options->{content_type_options} || "";
6064:     my $includegraphics = $content_options->{includegraphics};
6065:     my $caption = $content_options->{caption};
6066:     my $caption_main = $content_options->{caption_main} || "";
6067:     my $caption_main_short = $content_options->{caption_main_short} || "";
6068:     my $caption_short = $content_options->{caption_short} || "";
6069:     my $label = $content_options->{label};
6070: 
6071:     # if there is content
6072: 
6073:     if (defined $includegraphics)
6074:     {
6075:         # output the content begin marker
6076: 
6077:         print $output_file '\begin{figure}' . "$content_type_options\n";
6078: 
6079:         my $width_divider = 2 / scalar @$includegraphics;
6080: 
6081:         for (my $index = 0 ; $index < scalar @$includegraphics ; $index++)
6082:         {
6083:             my $includegraphic = $includegraphics->[$index];
6084: 
6085:             print $output_file '  \begin{subfigure}' . '{' . $width_divider . '\textwidth}' . "\n";
6086: 
6087:             print $output_file '  \centering' . "\n";
6088: 
6089:             my $includegraphics_options = "[width=.9" . '\linewidth]';
6090: 
6091:             print $output_file '    \includegraphics' . $includegraphics_options . "{$includegraphic}\n";
6092: 
6093: #           print $output_file '    \caption[' . $caption_short->[$index] . ']{\small \textbf{' . $caption->[$index] . '}}' . "\n";
6094: 
6095:             print $output_file '  \end{subfigure}' . "\n";
6096:         }
6097: 
6098:         if ($caption_main)
6099:         {
6100:             print $output_file '    \caption[' . $caption_main_short . ']{\small \textbf{' . $caption_main . '}}' . "\n";
6101:         }
6102: 
6103:         if ($label)
6104:         {
6105:             print $output_file '  \label{'. $label . '}' . "\n";
6106:         }
6107: 
6108:         # output the content end marker
6109: 
6110:         print $output_file '\end{figure}' . "\n\n";
6111:     }
6112: 
6113:     # return result: no error
6114: 
6115:     return undef;
6116: }
6117: 
6118: 
6119: sub new
6120: {
6121:     my $self = shift;
6122: 
6123:     $self = $self->SUPER::new(@_);
6124: 
6125:     my $variables
6126:         = [
6127:            {
6128:             name => "Activation",
6129:             regex_parser => '-?[0-9]+\.[-e0-9]+ (-?[0-9]+\.[-e0-9]+)',
6130:            },
6131:           ];
6132: 
6133:     $self->{figure_definition}->{variables} = $variables;
6134: 
6135:     return $self;
6136: }
6137: 
6138: 
6139: sub render
6140: {
6141:     my $self = shift;
6142: 
6143:     # convert the data string to a data structure
6144: 
6145:     use YAML;
6146: 
6147:     my $data_string = $self->{data_string};
6148: 
6149:     # remove object class references
6150: 
6151:     $data_string =~ s(!!.*?\n)(\n)g;
6152: 
6153:     # load all documents
6154: 
6155:     my $data_structured = [ Load($data_string), ];
6156: 
6157:     # split the data into its two components
6158: 
6159:     my $data_structured_forward = $data_structured->[0];
6160: 
6161:     my $data_structured_backward = $data_structured->[1];
6162: 
6163:     # render the values: forward kinetics
6164: 
6165:     my $data_a_forward = $data_structured_forward->{alpha};
6166: 
6167:     my $hi_forward = $data_structured_forward->{hi};
6168: 
6169:     my $pathname_prefix = $self->{pathname_prefix};
6170: 
6171:     my $output_filename_a_forward = "$pathname_prefix-a-forward-output_graph_render.png";
6172: 
6173:     my $figure_filename_a_forward = $self->render_array($output_filename_a_forward, $data_a_forward, $hi_forward->{start}, $hi_forward->{end}, $hi_forward->{step});
6174: 
6175:     if (ref $figure_filename_a_forward)
6176:     {
6177:         return $figure_filename_a_forward;
6178:     }
6179: 
6180:     my $data_b_forward = $data_structured_forward->{beta};
6181: 
6182:     my $output_filename_b_forward = "$pathname_prefix-b-forward-output_graph_render.png";
6183: 
6184:     my $figure_filename_b_forward = $self->render_array($output_filename_b_forward, $data_b_forward, $hi_forward->{start}, $hi_forward->{end}, $hi_forward->{step});
6185: 
6186:     if (ref $figure_filename_b_forward)
6187:     {
6188:         return $figure_filename_b_forward;
6189:     }
6190: 
6191:     # render the values: backward kinetics
6192: 
6193:     my $data_a_backward = $data_structured_backward->{alpha};
6194: 
6195:     my $hi_backward = $data_structured_backward->{hi};
6196: 
6197:     my $output_filename_a_backward = "$pathname_prefix-a-backward-output_graph_render.png";
6198: 
6199:     my $figure_filename_a_backward = $self->render_array($output_filename_a_backward, $data_a_backward, $hi_backward->{start}, $hi_backward->{end}, $hi_backward->{step});
6200: 
6201:     if (ref $figure_filename_a_backward)
6202:     {
6203:         return $figure_filename_a_backward;
6204:     }
6205: 
6206:     my $data_b_backward = $data_structured_backward->{beta};
6207: 
6208:     my $output_filename_b_backward = "$pathname_prefix-b-backward-output_graph_render.png";
6209: 
6210:     my $figure_filename_b_backward = $self->render_array($output_filename_b_backward, $data_b_backward, $hi_backward->{start}, $hi_backward->{end}, $hi_backward->{step});
6211: 
6212:     if (ref $figure_filename_b_backward)
6213:     {
6214:         return $figure_filename_b_backward;
6215:     }
6216: 
6217:     # set the filenames of the rendered graphs
6218: 
6219:     my $filenames = [ $figure_filename_a_forward, $figure_filename_b_forward, $figure_filename_a_backward, $figure_filename_b_backward, ];
6220: 
6221:     $self->{filenames} = $filenames;
6222: 
6223:     # return: no error
6224: 
6225:     return undef;
6226: }
6227: 
6228: 
6229: package Heterarch::Test::Output::Formatter::Figure::HHGatesInternal;
6230: 
6231: 
6232: our @ISA = ("Heterarch::Test::Output::Formatter::Figure");
6233: 
6234: 
6235: sub generate_label
6236: {
6237:     my $self = shift;
6238: 
6239:     return $self->SUPER::generate_label(@_);
6240: }
6241: 
6242: 
6243: sub insert
6244: {
6245:     my $self = shift;
6246: 
6247:     my $figure_definition = shift;
6248: 
6249:     my $full_caption = $figure_definition->{caption}->{full};
6250: 
6251:     my $short_caption = $figure_definition->{caption}->{short};
6252: 
6253:     my $filenames = $self->{filenames};
6254: 
6255:     # insert the figure filename in the latex file
6256: 
6257:     $self->insert_figure_environment
6258:         (
6259:          $output_file,
6260:          {
6261:           caption => [
6262:                       $figure_definition->{caption_A}->{full},
6263:                       $figure_definition->{caption_B}->{full},
6264:                      ],
6265:           caption_main => $figure_definition->{caption}->{full},
6266:           caption_main_short => $figure_definition->{caption}->{short},
6267:           caption_short => [
6268:                             $figure_definition->{caption_A}->{short},
6269:                             $figure_definition->{caption_B}->{short},
6270:                            ],
6271:           content_type_options => '[ht]',
6272:           includegraphics => $filenames,
6273:           label => $self->{figure_label},
6274:          },
6275:         );
6276: }
6277: 
6278: 
6279: sub insert_figure_environment
6280: {
6281:     my $self = shift;
6282: 
6283:     my $outputfile = shift;
6284: 
6285:     my $content_options = shift;
6286: 
6287:     my $content_type_options = $content_options->{content_type_options} || "";
6288:     my $includegraphics = $content_options->{includegraphics};
6289:     my $caption = $content_options->{caption};
6290:     my $caption_main = $content_options->{caption_main} || "";
6291:     my $caption_main_short = $content_options->{caption_main_short} || "";
6292:     my $caption_short = $content_options->{caption_short} || "";
6293:     my $label = $content_options->{label};
6294: 
6295:     # if there is content
6296: 
6297:     if (defined $includegraphics)
6298:     {
6299:         # output the content begin marker
6300: 
6301:         print $output_file '\begin{figure}' . "$content_type_options\n";
6302: 
6303:         my $width_divider = 1 / scalar @$includegraphics;
6304: 
6305:         for (my $index = 0 ; $index < scalar @$includegraphics ; $index++)
6306:         {
6307:             my $includegraphic = $includegraphics->[$index];
6308: 
6309:             print $output_file '  \begin{subfigure}' . '{' . $width_divider . '\textwidth}' . "\n";
6310: 
6311:             print $output_file '  \centering' . "\n";
6312: 
6313:             my $includegraphics_options = "[width=.9" . '\linewidth]';
6314: 
6315:             print $output_file '    \includegraphics' . $includegraphics_options . "{$includegraphic}\n";
6316: 
6317:             print $output_file '    \caption[' . $caption_short->[$index] . ']{\small \textbf{' . $caption->[$index] . '}}' . "\n";
6318: 
6319:             print $output_file '  \end{subfigure}' . "\n";
6320:         }
6321: 
6322:         if ($caption_main)
6323:         {
6324:             print $output_file '    \caption[' . $caption_main_short . ']{\small \textbf{' . $caption_main . '}}' . "\n";
6325:         }
6326: 
6327:         if ($label)
6328:         {
6329:             print $output_file '  \label{'. $label . '}' . "\n";
6330:         }
6331: 
6332:         # output the content end marker
6333: 
6334:         print $output_file '\end{figure}' . "\n\n";
6335:     }
6336: 
6337:     # return result: no error
6338: 
6339:     return undef;
6340: }
6341: 
6342: 
6343: sub new
6344: {
6345:     my $self = shift;
6346: 
6347:     $self = $self->SUPER::new(@_);
6348: 
6349:     my $variables
6350:         = [
6351:            {
6352:             name => "Activation",
6353:             regex_parser => '-?[0-9]+\.[-e0-9]+ (-?[0-9]+\.[-e0-9]+)',
6354:            },
6355:           ];
6356: 
6357:     $self->{figure_definition}->{variables} = $variables;
6358: 
6359:     return $self;
6360: }
6361: 
6362: 
6363: sub render
6364: {
6365:     my $self = shift;
6366: 
6367:     # convert the data string to a data structure
6368: 
6369:     use YAML;
6370: 
6371:     my $data_string = "---
6372: $self->{data_string}";
6373: 
6374:     # remove object class references
6375: 
6376:     $data_string =~ s(!!.*?\n)();
6377: 
6378:     my $data_structured = Load($data_string);
6379: 
6380:     # split the data into its two components
6381: 
6382:     my $data_a = $data_structured->{A};
6383: 
6384:     my $hi = $data_structured->{hi};
6385: 
6386:     my $pathname_prefix = $self->{pathname_prefix};
6387: 
6388:     my $output_filename_a = "$pathname_prefix-a-output_graph_render.png";
6389: 
6390:     my $figure_filename_a = $self->render_array($output_filename_a, $data_a, $hi->{start}, $hi->{end}, $hi->{step});
6391: 
6392:     if (ref $figure_filename_a)
6393:     {
6394:         return $figure_filename_a;
6395:     }
6396: 
6397:     my $data_b = $data_structured->{B};
6398: 
6399:     my $output_filename_b = "$pathname_prefix-b-output_graph_render.png";
6400: 
6401:     my $figure_filename_b = $self->render_array($output_filename_b, $data_b, $hi->{start}, $hi->{end}, $hi->{step});
6402: 
6403:     if (ref $figure_filename_b)
6404:     {
6405:         return $figure_filename_b;
6406:     }
6407: 
6408:     # set the filenames of the rendered graphs
6409: 
6410:     my $filenames = [ $figure_filename_a, $figure_filename_b, ];
6411: 
6412:     $self->{filenames} = $filenames;
6413: 
6414:     # return: no error
6415: 
6416:     return undef;
6417: }
6418: 
6419: 
6420: package Heterarch::Test::Output::Formatter::Figure::HHGatesSteadyStateTau;
6421: 
6422: 
6423: our @ISA = ("Heterarch::Test::Output::Formatter::Figure");
6424: 
6425: 
6426: package Heterarch::Test::Output::Formatter::Figure::Simple;
6427: 
6428: 
6429: our @ISA = ("Heterarch::Test::Output::Formatter::Figure");
6430: 
6431: 
6432: sub generate_label
6433: {
6434:     my $self = shift;
6435: 
6436:     return $self->SUPER::generate_label(@_);
6437: }
6438: 
6439: 
6440: sub new
6441: {
6442:     my $self = shift;
6443: 
6444:     return $self->SUPER::new(@_);
6445: }
6446: 
6447: 
6448: sub render
6449: {
6450:     my $self = shift;
6451: 
6452:     my $pathname_prefix = $self->{pathname_prefix};
6453: 
6454:     my $output_filename = "$pathname_prefix-output_graph_render.png";
6455: 
6456:     my $error = $self->SUPER::render_raw_data($output_filename, $self->{data_string});
6457: 
6458:     if ($error)
6459:     {
6460:         return $error;
6461:     }
6462:     else
6463:     {
6464:         # set the filenames of the rendered graphs
6465: 
6466:         my $filenames = [ $output_filename, ];
6467: 
6468:         $self->{filenames} = $filenames;
6469: 
6470:         # return: no error
6471: 
6472:         return undef;
6473:     }
6474: }
6475: 
6476: 
6477: package Heterarch::Test::Output::Formatter::PDF;
6478: 
6479: # The Heterarch::Test::Output::Formatter::Latex package converts the test specifications
6480: # to a Latex document.
6481: 
6482: 
6483: our @ISA = ("Heterarch::Test::Output::Formatter::Latex");
6484: 
6485: 
6486: sub _output_pdf_process
6487: {
6488:     use File::Basename qw( fileparse );
6489:     use File::Path qw( make_path );
6490:     use File::Spec;
6491: 
6492:     my $output_filename = shift;
6493: 
6494:     my ( $logfile, $directory ) = fileparse($output_filename);
6495: 
6496:     my $command = "cd '$directory' && pdflatex '$output_filename' && pdflatex '$output_filename'";
6497: 
6498:     system $command;
6499: }
6500: 
6501: 
6502: sub process
6503: {
6504:     my $self = shift;
6505: 
6506:     # my $result = Heterarch::Test::Output::Formatter::PDF->SUPER::process(@_);
6507: 
6508:     my $output_filename = shift;
6509: 
6510:     my $test_module_library_contents = shift;
6511: 
6512:     my $global_test_report = shift;
6513: 
6514:     my $result
6515:         = $self->SUPER::process
6516:         (
6517:          $output_filename,
6518:          $test_module_library_contents,
6519:          $global_test_report
6520:         );
6521: 
6522:     _output_pdf_process($output_filename);
6523: }
6524: 
6525: 
6526: package Heterarch::Test::Output::Formatter::YAML::Summary;
6527: 
6528: # The Formatter:YAML::Summary package converts the test specifications
6529: # to a YAML formatted summary.
6530: 
6531: 
6532: our @ISA = ("Heterarch::Test::Output::Summarizer");
6533: 
6534: 
6535: #
6536: # Create the infrastructure for keeping module test results.
6537: #
6538: 
6539: sub ex_mo_prepare
6540: {
6541:     my $self = shift;
6542: 
6543:     # get the execution context
6544: 
6545:     my $execution_context = $self->{execution_context};
6546: 
6547:     # create an output entry for the module
6548: 
6549:     my $module_definition = $execution_context->get_module_definition();
6550: 
6551:     my $module_name = $module_definition->{name};
6552: 
6553:     if (not $global_test_report->{selected}->{$module_name})
6554:     {
6555:         $global_test_report->{selected}->{$module_name} = [];
6556:     }
6557:     else
6558:     {
6559:         die "$0: *** Error: module_name $module_name is defined twice.";
6560:     }
6561: }
6562: 
6563: 
6564: # add the current test description to the summary
6565: 
6566: sub ex_ct_run
6567: {
6568:     my $self = shift;
6569: 
6570:     my $command_test = shift;
6571: 
6572:     my $execution_context = $self->{execution_context};
6573: 
6574:     my $command_definition = $execution_context->get_command_definition();
6575: 
6576:     my $module_definition = $execution_context->get_module_definition();
6577: 
6578:     my $module_name = $module_definition->{name};
6579: 
6580:     # get the current module summary
6581: 
6582:     my $selected_module = $global_test_report->{selected}->{$module_name};
6583: 
6584:     # get the current test summary
6585: 
6586:     my $selected_command_definitions = $selected_module->[$#$selected_module]->{tests};
6587: 
6588:     # add the current test description to the summary
6589: 
6590:     push @$selected_command_definitions, $command_test->{description};
6591: 
6592:     # always succeeds
6593: 
6594:     my $test_result
6595:         = {
6596:            after_match => "",
6597:            before_match => "",
6598:            error => "",
6599:            expected => "",
6600:            matched_pattern_position => "",
6601:            successfully_matching_string => "",
6602:           };
6603: 
6604:     return $test_result;
6605: }
6606: 
6607: 
6608: # create an output entry for the current command definition
6609: 
6610: sub ex_cd_start
6611: {
6612:     my $self = shift;
6613: 
6614:     # get the execution context
6615: 
6616:     my $execution_context = $self->{execution_context};
6617: 
6618:     # create an output entry for the module
6619: 
6620:     my $module_definition = $execution_context->get_module_definition();
6621: 
6622:     my $module_name = $module_definition->{name};
6623: 
6624:     # create an output entry for the current command definition
6625: 
6626:     my $selected_module = $global_test_report->{selected}->{$module_name};
6627: 
6628:     my $command_definition = $execution_context->get_command_definition();
6629: 
6630:     push @$selected_module, { description => $command_definition->{description}, tests => [], };
6631: }
6632: 
6633: 
6634: # note that this implementation is the same as the one of ex_terminate() in
6635: # Heterarch::Test::Output::Formatter::YAML::CommandTests
6636: 
6637: sub ex_terminate
6638: {
6639:     my $self = shift;
6640: 
6641:     my $fd_output = shift;
6642: 
6643:     my $test_module_library_contents = shift;
6644: 
6645:     # yaml out the test report
6646: 
6647:     my $report_yaml
6648:         = {
6649:            description => $global_test_report->{description},
6650:           };
6651: 
6652:     # add output specific to the output selection
6653: 
6654:     if ($option_report_disabled)
6655:     {
6656:         $report_yaml->{disabled} = $global_test_report->{disabled};
6657:     }
6658: 
6659:     $report_yaml->{selected} = $global_test_report->{selected};
6660: 
6661:     use YAML;
6662: 
6663:     my $report_text = "\n" . Dump($report_yaml);
6664: 
6665:     print $global_fd_output "$report_text\n";
6666: }
6667: 
6668: 
6669: package Heterarch::Test::Output::Formatter::YAML::CommandTests;
6670: 
6671: # The Formatter:YAML::CommandTests package converts the test
6672: # specifications to a YAML formatted list of commands and their input
6673: # in the write clauses, that would be executed if the tests are run.
6674: 
6675: 
6676: our @ISA = ("Heterarch::Test::Output::Summarizer");
6677: 
6678: 
6679: #
6680: # Create the infrastructure for keeping module test results.
6681: #
6682: 
6683: sub ex_mo_prepare
6684: {
6685:     my $self = shift;
6686: 
6687: }
6688: 
6689: 
6690: # create an output entry for the current command definition
6691: # add the current test description to the summary
6692: 
6693: sub ex_ct_run
6694: {
6695:     my $self = shift;
6696: 
6697:     my $command_test = shift;
6698: 
6699:     my $execution_context = $self->{execution_context};
6700: 
6701:     my $command_definition = $execution_context->get_command_definition();
6702: 
6703:     my $module_definition = $execution_context->get_module_definition();
6704: 
6705:     my $module_name = $module_definition->{name};
6706: 
6707:     # only if there is something to add
6708: 
6709:     if (exists $command_test->{write}
6710:         and defined $command_test->{write})
6711:     {
6712:         # get the current module summary
6713: 
6714:         my $selected_module = $global_test_report->{selected}->{$module_name};
6715: 
6716:         # get the current test summary
6717: 
6718:         if (not exists $selected_module->[$#$selected_module]->{tests})
6719:         {
6720:             $selected_module->[$#$selected_module]->{tests} = [];
6721:         }
6722: 
6723:         my $selected_command_definitions = $selected_module->[$#$selected_module]->{tests};
6724: 
6725:         # add the current test write clause to the summary
6726: 
6727:         push @$selected_command_definitions, $command_test->{write};
6728:     }
6729: 
6730:     # always succeeds
6731: 
6732:     my $test_result
6733:         = {
6734:            after_match => "",
6735:            before_match => "",
6736:            error => "",
6737:            expected => "",
6738:            matched_pattern_position => "",
6739:            successfully_matching_string => "",
6740:           };
6741: 
6742:     return $test_result;
6743: }
6744: 
6745: 
6746: sub ex_cd_start
6747: {
6748:     my $self = shift;
6749: 
6750:     # get the execution context
6751: 
6752:     my $execution_context = $self->{execution_context};
6753: 
6754:     # create an output entry for the module
6755: 
6756:     #t we could add a counter here to keep the order of execution in the final yaml output
6757: 
6758:     my $module_definition = $execution_context->get_module_definition();
6759: 
6760:     my $module_name = $module_definition->{name};
6761: 
6762:     my $command_definition = $execution_context->get_command_definition();
6763: 
6764:     if (exists $command_definition->{command})
6765:     {
6766:         if (not $global_test_report->{selected}->{$module_name})
6767:         {
6768:             $global_test_report->{selected}->{$module_name} = [];
6769:         }
6770: 
6771:         # create an output entry for the current command definition
6772: 
6773:         my $selected_module = $global_test_report->{selected}->{$module_name};
6774: 
6775:         # retrieve the shell command and its arguments
6776: 
6777:         my ($command, $arguments) = $command_definition->parse_command_line();
6778: 
6779:         my $command_string = $command . ' ' . join ' ', @ { $arguments || [] };
6780: 
6781:         push @$selected_module, { command => $command_string, };
6782:     }
6783: }
6784: 
6785: 
6786: # note that this implementation is the same as the one of ex_terminate() in
6787: # Heterarch::Test::Output::Formatter::YAML::Summary
6788: 
6789: sub ex_terminate
6790: {
6791:     my $self = shift;
6792: 
6793:     my $fd_output = shift;
6794: 
6795:     my $test_module_library_contents = shift;
6796: 
6797:     # yaml out the test report
6798: 
6799:     my $report_yaml
6800:         = {
6801:            description => $global_test_report->{description},
6802:           };
6803: 
6804:     # add output specific to the output selection
6805: 
6806:     if ($option_report_disabled)
6807:     {
6808:         $report_yaml->{disabled} = $global_test_report->{disabled};
6809:     }
6810: 
6811:     $report_yaml->{selected} = $global_test_report->{selected};
6812: 
6813:     use YAML;
6814: 
6815:     my $report_text = "\n" . Dump($report_yaml);
6816: 
6817:     print $global_fd_output "$report_text\n";
6818: }
6819: 
6820: 
6821: package Heterarch::Test::Output::Definitions;
6822: 
6823: # The Heterarch::Test::Output::Definitions package should list all the
6824: # supported constructs that can be used in the test specifications.
6825: #
6826: # This list has been developed in a separate emacs-org document.
6827: #
6828: 
6829: our @ISA = ("Heterarch::Test::Output::Summarizer");
6830: 
6831: 
6832: package Heterarch::Test::Output::List;
6833: 
6834: # this package should list the constructs used in the selected test
6835: # specifications.
6836: 
6837: # inherit from the yaml summary to automate text context tracking through its start sub
6838: 
6839: our @ISA = ("Heterarch::Test::Output::Formatter::YAML::Summary");
6840: 
6841: 
6842: sub ex_ct_run
6843: {
6844:     my $self = shift;
6845: 
6846:     my $command_test = shift;
6847: 
6848:     my $execution_context = $self->{execution_context};
6849: 
6850:     my $command_definition = $execution_context->get_command_definition();
6851: 
6852:     my $module_definition = $execution_context->get_module_definition();
6853: 
6854: }
6855: 
6856: 
6857: package Heterarch::Test::Output::StructureSummary;
6858: 
6859: 
6860: sub ss_command_definitions
6861: {
6862:     my $self = shift;
6863: 
6864:     my $command_definitions = shift;
6865: 
6866:     $self->{cd_0} = scalar @$command_definitions eq 0 ? 1 : 0;
6867:     $self->{cd_1} = scalar @$command_definitions eq 1 ? 1 : 0;
6868:     $self->{cd_1_comment} = $self->{cd_1} && exists $command_definitions->[0]->{comment};
6869: }
6870: 
6871: 
6872: sub ss_command_tests
6873: {
6874:     my $self = shift;
6875: 
6876:     my $command_tests = shift;
6877: 
6878:     $self->{ct_0} = defined $command_tests && scalar @$command_tests eq 0 ? 1 : 0;
6879:     $self->{ct_1} = defined $command_tests && scalar @$command_tests eq 1 ? 1 : 0;
6880: }
6881: 
6882: 
6883: sub ss_figure_references
6884: {
6885:     my $self = shift;
6886: 
6887:     my $figure_references = shift;
6888: 
6889:     # $self->{fr_0} = scalar @$figure_references eq 0 ? 1 : 0;
6890:     # $self->{fr_1} = scalar @$figure_references eq 1 ? 1 : 0;
6891: }
6892: 
6893: 
6894: sub new
6895: {
6896:     my $package = shift;
6897: 
6898:     my $self
6899:         = {
6900:            cd_0 => undef,
6901:            cd_1 => undef,
6902:            cd_1_comment => undef,
6903:            ct_0 => undef,
6904:            ct_1 => undef,
6905:            # fr_0 => undef,
6906:            # fr_1 => undef,
6907:           };
6908: 
6909:     bless $self, $package;
6910: 
6911:     return $self
6912: }
6913: 
6914: 
6915: package Heterarch::Test::Reporting;
6916: 
6917: 
6918: sub report_error_add
6919: {
6920:     my $fd_output = shift;
6921: 
6922:     my $arguments = shift;
6923: 
6924:     my $description = $arguments->{description};
6925:     my $error = $arguments->{error};
6926:     my $expected = $arguments->{expected};
6927:     my $message = $arguments->{message};
6928:     my $module_name = $arguments->{module_name};
6929:     my $seen = $arguments->{seen};
6930:     my $subdescription = $arguments->{subdescription};
6931: 
6932:     my $package_name = $global_test_report->{description}->{package}->{name};
6933: 
6934:     $global_error_count++;
6935: 
6936:     print $fd_output "*** Error $global_error_count: $error ($description, package $package_name, $module_name, error_count $global_error_count)\n";
6937: 
6938:     # fill in the error report
6939: 
6940:     $global_test_report->{global}->{error_count} = $global_error_count;
6941: 
6942:     if ($subdescription)
6943:     {
6944:         $global_test_report->{errors}->{modules}->{$module_name}->{$global_error_count}->{$subdescription}->{description} = $description;
6945:     }
6946:     else
6947:     {
6948:         $global_test_report->{errors}->{modules}->{$module_name}->{$global_error_count}->{description} = $description;
6949:     }
6950: 
6951:     $global_test_report->{errors}->{modules}->{$module_name}->{$global_error_count}->{error} = $error;
6952: 
6953:     if (defined $message)
6954:     {
6955:         #! subdescription can be undefined here, in which case
6956:         #! $message is undefined too.  Both can be defined when
6957:         #! running in verbose mode seems, allows to track regex
6958:         #! problems ... I think.
6959: 
6960:         $global_test_report->{errors}->{modules}->{$module_name}->{$global_error_count}->{$subdescription}->{report} = $message;
6961:     }
6962: 
6963:     if (defined $expected
6964:         and defined $seen)
6965:     {
6966:         my $processed_expected = [ split "\n", $expected, ];
6967: 
6968:         $processed_expected = join "\n*** Error $global_error_count: expected: ", "", @$processed_expected, "\n";
6969: 
6970:         print $fd_output $processed_expected;
6971: 
6972:         my $processed_seen = [ split "\n", $seen, ];
6973: 
6974:         $processed_seen = join "\n*** Error $global_error_count: seen: ", "", @$processed_seen, "\n";
6975: 
6976:         print $fd_output $processed_seen;
6977: 
6978:         use IO::File;
6979: 
6980:         my $expected_filename = "/tmp/text_$global_config->{package}->{name}_$global_error_count.expected";
6981: 
6982:         my $expected_file = IO::File->new(">$expected_filename");
6983: 
6984:         if ($expected_file)
6985:         {
6986:             print $expected_file $expected;
6987: 
6988:             $expected_file->close();
6989:         }
6990:         else
6991:         {
6992:             print $fd_output "*** Warning: cannot open $expected_filename for writing\n";
6993:         }
6994: 
6995:         my $seen_filename = "/tmp/text_$global_config->{package}->{name}_$global_error_count.seen";
6996: 
6997:         my $seen_file = IO::File->new(">$seen_filename");
6998: 
6999:         if ($seen_filename)
7000:         {
7001:             print $seen_file $seen;
7002: 
7003:             $seen_file->close();
7004:         }
7005:         else
7006:         {
7007:             print $fd_output "*** Warning: cannot open $seen_filename for writing\n";
7008:         }
7009: 
7010:         my $diff = `diff "$expected_filename" "$seen_filename"`;
7011: 
7012:         my $diff_filename = "/tmp/text_$global_config->{package}->{name}_$global_error_count.diff";
7013: 
7014:         my $diff_file = IO::File->new(">$diff_filename");
7015: 
7016:         if ($diff_file)
7017:         {
7018:             print $diff_file $diff;
7019: 
7020:             $diff_file->close();
7021:         }
7022:         else
7023:         {
7024:             print $fd_output "*** Warning: cannot open $diff_filename for writing\n";
7025:         }
7026: 
7027:         my $processed_diff = [ split "\n", $diff, ];
7028: 
7029:         $processed_diff = join "\n*** Error $global_error_count: diff: ", "", @$processed_diff, "\n";
7030: 
7031:         print $fd_output $processed_diff;
7032:     }
7033: 
7034: }
7035: 
7036: 
7037: my $rulers_not_used
7038:     = {
7039:        end => { bottom => 2, top => 1, },
7040:        info => { bottom => 1, top => 1, },
7041:        start => { bottom => 1, top => 2, },
7042:       };
7043: 
7044: sub report_message
7045: {
7046:     my $fd_output = shift;
7047: 
7048:     my $message = shift;
7049: 
7050:     print $fd_output "$message\n";
7051: }
7052: 
7053: 
7054: sub report_message_end
7055: {
7056:     my $fd_output = shift;
7057: 
7058:     my $message = shift;
7059: 
7060:     return _report_message_with_rulers($fd_output, 1, 2, $message);
7061: }
7062: 
7063: 
7064: sub report_message_info
7065: {
7066:     my $fd_output = shift;
7067: 
7068:     my $message = shift;
7069: 
7070:     return _report_message_with_rulers($fd_output, 1, 1, $message);
7071: }
7072: 
7073: 
7074: sub report_message_start
7075: {
7076:     my $fd_output = shift;
7077: 
7078:     my $message = shift;
7079: 
7080:     return _report_message_with_rulers($fd_output, 2, 1, $message);
7081: }
7082: 
7083: 
7084: sub _report_message_with_rulers
7085: {
7086:     my $fd_output = shift;
7087: 
7088:     my $top_ruler = shift;
7089: 
7090:     my $bottom_ruler = shift;
7091: 
7092:     my $message = shift;
7093: 
7094:     my $lines = [ split '\n', $message, ];
7095: 
7096:     my $longest = 0;
7097: 
7098:     map
7099:     {
7100:         ($longest < length) && ($longest = length)
7101:     }
7102:         @$lines;
7103: 
7104:     my $line = '-' x $longest;
7105: 
7106:     print $fd_output "\n";
7107:     print $fd_output "$line\n" for 0 .. $top_ruler;
7108:     print $fd_output "\n";
7109:     print $fd_output "$message\n\n";
7110:     print $fd_output "$line\n" for 0 .. $bottom_ruler;
7111:     print $fd_output "\n";
7112: }
7113: 
7114: 
7115: package main;
7116: 
7117: 
7118: main();
7119: 
7120: 
7121:
